title: potentilla tormentilla subsp. procumbens
intro: Potentilla tormentilla subsp. procumbens, also known as Tormentil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of iridoid glycosides and tannins. Tormentil has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions, and its health benefits may include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Tormentil include teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
